subcodes.first_line: O thou steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was musk-laden in its contents and sweet as honey in its meanings, even as a fragrance from the rose-garden [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه مشکین مضامینش شکرین بود و معانیش دلنشین زیرا نفحه گلشن
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
